title: The Locust Blossom. A Quatrain.
content:
The spirit Spring, in rainy raiment, met
 The spirit Summer for a moonlit hour:
 Sweet from their greeting kisses, warm and wet,
 Earth shaped the fragrant purity of this flower.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Madison Julius Cawein delivers a powerful performance in "The Locust Blossom. A Quatrain."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
